intro: Metastelma infimicola, also known as Desert Swallow Wort, is a perennial plant species in the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its traditional medicinal uses, where it has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Metastelma infimicola include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Metastelma infimicola include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate respiratory problems and support immune function.
